    C

    ClassInstantiationException - Exception Class in dk.tij.registermaschine.api.error
    Thrown when a class cannot be instantiated via reflection or other dynamic mechanisms.

    column() - Method in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.api.compilation.lexing.IToken
    Returns the column number in the source input.
    COMMA - Enum constant in enum class dk.tij.registermaschine.api.compilation.lexing.TokenType
    Separator between operands.
    COMMENT - Enum constant in enum class dk.tij.registermaschine.api.compilation.lexing.TokenType
    Comment token.
    compile(ISyntaxTree, IInstructionSet) - Method in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.api.compilation.ICompiler
    Compiles a syntax tree into a compiled program.
    concept() - Method in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.api.compilation.compiling.ICompiledOperand
    Returns the conceptual role of this operand.
    concept() - Method in record class dk.tij.registermaschine.api.config.ConfigOperand
    Returns the value of the concept record component.
    ConditionParseException - Exception Class in dk.tij.registermaschine.api.error
    Thrown when a condition expression cannot be parsed or is invalid.
    ConditionParseException(String) - Constructor for exception class dk.tij.registermaschine.api.error.ConditionParseException
     
    ConfigInstruction - Record Class in dk.tij.registermaschine.api.config
    Describes a single instruction within a configuration.

    Creates an instance of a ConfigInstruction record class.
    ConfigOperand - Record Class in dk.tij.registermaschine.api.config
    Describes an operand definition within an instruction configuration.
    ConfigOperand(OperandType, OperandConcept, String) - Constructor for record class dk.tij.registermaschine.api.config.ConfigOperand
    Creates an instance of a ConfigOperand record class.
    ConfigurationParseException - Exception Class in dk.tij.registermaschine.api.error
    Thrown when a configuration file or object cannot be parsed correctly.

    ConfigurationParseException(String, Exception) - Constructor for exception class dk.tij.registermaschine.api.error.ConfigurationParseException
     
    contains(byte) - Method in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.api.instructions.IInstructionSet
    Checks whether an instruction with the given opcode exists.
    contains(String) - Method in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.api.instructions.IInstructionSet
    Checks whether an instruction with the given mnemonic exists.
